calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
9:35 A.M. Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Plaintiff: Victor Huang, present in pro per with Witness: Valentino Ristevski.
No appearance by the Defendant: Daisy Bram.
Plaintiff and Witness were sworn and examined.
The Court admonished Plaintiff for not being present at the Settlement Conference last week.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Daisy Bram, Plaintiff to prepare Judgment.

At 10:05 A.M. Defendant: Daisy Bram, present in pro per in court, was advised of the Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing earlier today.

At 10:15 A.M. Parties present in court and referred back to the Master Calendar Dept., for re-assignment to settlement with a JPT.

At 12:10 P.M. Case settled with JPT: Peter Hadiaris, terms were not read into the record, "Judgment pursuant to Settlement" filed and entered in court, see scanned doc for details.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Off Calendar
